    text: "[10,00,00]"

  restriction {

  tensor: "a01*b10*c00 + a01*b11*c10 + a11*b10*c01 + a11*b11*c11 + a20*b00*c02 + a20*b01*c12 + a21*b10*c02 + a21*b11*c12"
  rank_lower_bound: 8
  rank_lower_bound_proof {
    degenerate_proof {
      extra_restriction: 18
      transformation {
        gl_left: 311
        gl_right: 13
      }
    }
  }
}
